title: ferray-core: creation functions missing: linspace, logspace, geomspace, eye, diag, tri
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's core array creation functions include np.linspace, np.logspace, np.geomspace, np.eye, np.identity, np.diag, np.diagflat, np.tri, np.tril, np.triu. These live in numpy._core (function_base.py, numeric.py). Check ferray-core/src/creation/mod.rs for what's implemented. Any missing ones should be added — these are fundamental building blocks that nearly every scientific computing program uses. linspace and eye are especially critical.
